title: Remove advisor mode from libs, onboarding defaults, and tests (D1)
action: Per D1 (CONTEXT.md), remove advisor mode from the runtime wholesale. In templates/lib/state.mjs remove the WHOLE advisor block lines 87-108 (comments included: ADVISOR_POINTS, DEFAULT_ADVISOR, normalizeAdvisor), the line-147 comment, and the whole advisorModel function (534-547, through its closing brace). In readConfig, deleting the 'advisor: normalizeAdvisor(...)' line (329) is NOT enough: readConfig spreads '...config', so a stale advisor key in config.json would still flow through the spread into the parsed result. Destructure it out (e.g. 'const { advisor: _ignored, ...rest } = config' and spread 'rest') so the parsed result contains NO advisor key while readConfig still TOLERATES the stale key (never throws). In templates/lib/inject.mjs delete the ADVISOR MODE preamble block (125-130). In templates/bee_status.mjs delete the advisor field (108) and its render (178-180); when the repo's .bee/config.json still carries an advisor key, bee_status and onboard_bee each surface ONE warning line ('advisor mode was removed in 0.1.23; the advisor key in .bee/config.json is ignored — delete it') — warn, never error (D1). In scripts/onboard_bee.mjs delete the DEFAULT_CONFIG.advisor block (96-99) and add the same stale-key warning to the report. In templates/tests/test_lib.mjs drop the advisorModel/ADVISOR_POINTS imports (26-27) and the whole advisor test block (1099-1132); ADD test rows RED-first: (a) config WITH a stale advisor key -> readConfig succeeds and the key is absent from the parsed result, (b) config WITHOUT the key -> unchanged behavior, (c) no export named advisorModel remains (import must fail or reflection check). Remove the advisor block from .bee/config-sample.json. Copy every changed templates/ file byte-identically to its .bee/bin twin. Do NOT touch skills prose, README, docs, or .bee/config.json (owned elsewhere).

truths: no export named advisorModel, ADVISOR_POINTS, DEFAULT_ADVISOR, or normalizeAdvisor exists anywhere in templates/lib or .bee/bin/lib
readConfig on a config.json that still contains an advisor key succeeds and simply ignores the key (warn-only surfacing lives in bee_status/onboard, never a throw)
the session preamble and bee_status render no advisor line; tier_mix and models rendering are unchanged
templates/ and .bee/bin twins stay byte-identical (standing sweep green)
artifacts: test rows for stale-key tolerance recorded RED before the lib edit in the cell trace
key_links: decision 0015 transport clause survivors: ceiling remains the session model
prohibitions: never touch skills/*/SKILL.md or docs/ in this cell
no error/exit-nonzero path for a stale advisor key

verify: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && ! grep -rn 'advisorModel\|ADVISOR_POINTS\|normalizeAdvisor\|DEFAULT_ADVISOR' skills/bee-hive/templates .bee/bin --include='*.mjs' && ! grep -rn 'ADVISOR MODE' skills/bee-hive/templates .bee/bin --include='*.mjs'

trace.outcome: Removed advisor mode wholesale from lib/state.mjs, lib/inject.mjs, bee_status.mjs (templates + .bee/bin twins), onboard_bee.mjs DEFAULT_CONFIG, and .bee/config-sample.json (D1). readConfig now destructures a stale advisor key out of the spread instead of normalizing it, so it is tolerated (never thrown) but never surfaces in the parsed result. bee_status.mjs and onboard_bee.mjs each warn once (never error) via a shared STALE_ADVISOR_KEY_WARNING message when a repo's raw .bee/config.json still carries the key. test_lib.mjs advisor test block replaced with a RED-first stale-key test (readConfig strips the key with/without it present, and lib/state.mjs's export surface exactly matches a post-removal allowlist).
trace.verify_output: test_lib.mjs: 169 passed, 0 failed. test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (case-alias skip, pre-existing, unrelated to this cell). Both grep checks (advisorModel|ADVISOR_POINTS|normalizeAdvisor|DEFAULT_ADVISOR and ADVISOR MODE) returned zero matches across skills/bee-hive/templates and .bee/bin. Full chained command exit code: 0.
trace.verify_command: node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs && ! grep -rn 'advisorModel\|ADVISOR_POINTS\|normalizeAdvisor\|DEFAULT_ADVISOR' skills/bee-hive/templates .bee/bin --include='*.mjs' && ! grep -rn 'ADVISOR MODE' skills/bee-hive/templates .bee/bin --include='*.mjs'
